# =================================================
# SEW=8
# =================================================
# VSETVLI SEW=8 LMUL=1
VINST=00000000000000000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

# WADD_2SEW v2 = widen(v0)+widen(v1)
VINST=11010100000100000000000101010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# NSRL v4 = narrow(v2)
VINST=10110000001000100000001001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VSETVLI SEW=8 LMUL=2
VINST=00000000000100000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

VINST=11010100001000000000001001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=10110000010001000000010001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=10110000100010000000100001010111
